title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 150.510 - Contents of license
text:
150.510.  Contents of license. — Every license shall state the manner in which the dealing is to be carried on, whether on foot, or with one or more beasts of burden, the kind of cart or carriage, or if on the water, the kind of boat or vessel to be employed.
(RSMo 1939 § 14610) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13314; 1919 § 9255; 1909 § 10284
